dct_title_s: California Department of Transportation GIS Maps & Data
dct_description_sm: This collection of data is produced by the California Department of Transportation (CalTrans) for planning, conservation, and analysis activities throughout the state of California.
System requirements: Geographic Information Systems (GIS) software that reads ESRI shapefile format.
dct_rights_sm: This item is in the public domain.  There are no restrictions on use.
dct_rightsHolder_sm: This work is in the Public Domain, meaning that it is not subject to copyright.
